# International Delivery Times

International shipping typically begins within two business days, followed by a transit time of seven to fourteen business days, which can vary based on the destination and local customs processes. However, deliveries to remote areas outside major metropolitan regions may require an additional three to five business days for arrival.

[Source: international_shipping.md#international-delivery-times]
